# Search Toolbox — LLMs.txt
# https://seogeotoolkit.com/llms.txt

## Product
Name: Search Toolbox (Chrome Web Store: "SEO & GEO Toolkit by Search Toolbox")
Type: Browser Extension (Chrome, Edge, Brave, Arc)
Price: Free
URL: https://seogeotoolkit.com
Category: SEO Tools / Browser Extensions

## What it does
Search Toolbox is the most complete on-page SEO Chrome extension available.
It replaces 10+ separate SEO extensions with a single browser sidebar.
60+ tools spanning semantic SEO, technical SEO, netlinking, performance, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization).

## Core capabilities
- Page overview: title, meta description, canonical, robots, Open Graph, Twitter Card
- Heading hierarchy audit (H1–H6), visual tree with error detection
- Schema / structured data inspector: JSON-LD, Microdata, RDFa — syntax-highlighted, validated
- Hreflang deep auditor: return links, x-default, language/region mismatches
- Redirect chain tracer: every hop with status code, response time, loop detection
- Robots.txt + X-Robots-Tag checker with Googlebot / Bingbot simulation
- Image SEO audit with CSV / ZIP export
- Social media preview: OG, Twitter Card, LinkedIn, WhatsApp
- SERP VPN: geo-simulate Google results from any country
- Full link audit: anchor text, rel attributes, nofollow detection, CSV export
- JS render comparison: DOM before/after JavaScript execution
- Full-page screenshot, PDF SEO report export
- Cookie editor, cache & storage cleaner
- User agent switcher, device emulation (mobile/desktop)
- Google Dorks launcher
- CSS / DevTools inspector in-panel
- SEO glossary (150+ terms)
- AI-powered features (coming soon)

## Unique / inédites features
- GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) analysis — AI search visibility audit
- Customizable panels and tool order
- Everything runs locally in the browser — no data sent to servers

## Competitive context
Replaces: SEO META in 1 CLICK, Detailed SEO Extension, MozBar, Link Redirect Trace, hreflang Tag Checker, Robots Exclusion Checker, User-Agent Switcher, EditThisCookie, Open Graph Preview, Tag Inspector, Schema Markup Validator, Redirect Path.
Unlike these, Search Toolbox works without switching tabs, requires no API keys, no account, and runs 100% offline.

## Brand
- Product name: Search Toolbox
- Chrome Store listing: SEO & GEO Toolkit by Search Toolbox
- Domain: seogeotoolkit.com
- Icon: pixel art heart (purple)
- Status: Public Beta — AI features coming soon

## Contact / Install
- Chrome Web Store: https://chrome.google.com/webstore/search/SEO%20GEO%20Toolkit%20Search%20Toolbox
- Website: https://seogeotoolkit.com
